subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest toward the horizon of contentment! Blessed art thou, inasmuch as thou hast inhaled the fragrance of My paradise and hast quaffed from the cup [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناظر الی شطر الرضا طوبی لک بما وجدت رایحه رضوانی و سقیت من کاس
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
